project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo with turbo build orchestration (Quant Ecosystem - 9-app interconnected platform)
language: TypeScript (ES2022 target, ESNext modules, bundler moduleResolution)
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + turbo 2.x, workspace packages in apps/*, packages/*, services/*
test_framework: vitest 2.x with globals:true, coverage via v8 provider, tests in __tests__/ dirs or colocated .test.ts files
build_command: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming
test_command: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm install to register the new package. 2. Run pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming. 3. Run pnpm test --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming. 4. Run pnpm lint --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming.
setup_instructions: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access. Node 22 via nvm (must source nvm.sh before use). No Docker needed for this package.
contribution_requirements: Package follows monorepo conventions: private:true, type:module, main/types pointing to src/index.ts, scripts: typecheck/test/build/lint. tsconfig extends root or uses standalone config like quant-studio. Dependencies use workspace:* for internal packages.
key_patterns: 1. Each package has: package.json, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts (barrel), src/types.ts, src/services/ or src/core/ dirs, src/__tests__/. 2. Types are defined with Zod schemas where validation needed, plain TS interfaces elsewhere. 3. Services are classes with constructor injection (config objects). 4. Tests use describe/it/expect from vitest globals. 5. Existing AgeGateService in @quant/moderation handles age restrictions. 6. QuantSDK in @quant/quant-studio already has multiplayer session + leaderboard primitives. 7. ChannelManager in @quant/realtime provides room/channel infrastructure. 8. SocialGraphService provides friend relationships and communities.
directory_structure: packages/cross-app-gaming/ (new) - will contain game session management, universal leaderboard, cross-app hosting adapters, minor safety layer, and identity bridge. Follows same structure as other packages: src/index.ts barrel, src/types.ts, src/services/, src/__tests__/
